title: Q1 Summary Report Discussion Meeting
content: Discussed the Q1 summary report framework. Director Wang's requirements: 1) Add latest March data 2) Include year-over-year comparison with Q1 last year 3) Add Q2 outlook section. Report deadline is March 28. Li Hua is responsible for providing the technical section data.

title: Dingxin Software Customization Proposal Discussion
content: The client raised 3 customization requirements: 1) User permission module 2) Custom data export 3) Dashboard customization. After our assessment, the first two items can be completed within 2 weeks. The client said the 3rd requirement still needs internal discussion before confirmation, and full development should start only after confirmation.

title: Performance Evaluation Discussion Meeting
content: Discussed this quarter's performance evaluation criteria and process. The evaluation form must be submitted before March 25. The assessment indicators were confirmed during the meeting, and I completed most of the form on the spot, with remaining items to be finalized afterward.
